name.description: Defines the resource's unique name; cannot be empty

tags.description: Key-value pairs for categorizing and organizing resources

timeouts.description: Configures operation timeouts (e.g., create, read, update, delete)

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
